title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 11.090 - Inmates of penal and eleemosynary institutions — names not to be published
text:
11.090.  Inmates of penal and eleemosynary institutions — names not to be published. — It is unlawful to print in the report of any penal or eleemosynary institution in this state, the names of the persons received and confined therein, or discharged therefrom.
(RSMo 1939 § 15012, A.L. 1957 p. 726) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13819
